one_time_description: Treaty loan forgiven - non-recurring debt forgiveness resulting in elimination of treaty debt deficit
economic_notes: Nuchatlaht owns 25% interest in Hayu Fishing Limited Partnership and 25% interest in Hayu Fishing Ltd. Also owns 1075124 B.C. Ltd. (fully consolidated). Scallops farm operation mentioned. Sport fishing charter activities.
notes: Treaty loan of $869,976 was forgiven during the year, eliminating the treaty debt deficit - this is a significant one-time non-cash item. The Nation receives major operating funding via Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council from Indigenous Services Canada. ISC funding amount not separately disclosed - flows through Tribal Council. Hayu Fishing LP financial data is as at December 31, 2019 (different year-end). Expenses broken out only by fund: Operating Fund $1,838,769, Social Housing Fund $23,386, Treaty Fund $97,210. No schedule of remuneration included in the provided pages.
